# OnlineLibrary Web Application Design Specification

## Section 1: Web Pages and Elements

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Page Title: Library Dashboard
- Overview: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities.
- Elements:
  - ID: dashboard-page - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - ID: welcome-message - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - ID: browse-books-button - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - ID: my-borrows-button - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- Page Title: Book Catalog
- Overview: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options.
- Elements:
  - ID: catalog-page - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.
  - ID: search-input - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.
  - ID: book-grid - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.
  - ID: view-book-button-{book_id} - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Book Details Page
- Page Title: Book Details
- Overview: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- Elements:
  - ID: book-details-page - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - ID: book-title - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - ID: book-author - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - ID: book-status - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).
  - ID: borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.
  - ID: reviews-section - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.
  - ID: write-review-button - Type: Button - Button to write a review.
  - ID: back-to-catalog - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.

### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page
- Page Title: Borrow Confirmation
- Overview: A page to confirm book borrowing details.
- Elements:
  - ID: borrow-page - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.
  - ID: borrow-book-info - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.
  - ID: due-date-display - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).
  - ID: confirm-borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.
  - ID: cancel-borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.

### 5. My Borrowings Page
- Page Title: My Borrowings
- Overview: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user.
- Elements:
  - ID: my-borrows-page - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.
  - ID: filter-status - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).
  - ID: borrows-table - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.
  - ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id} - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. My Reservations Page
- Page Title: My Reservations
- Overview: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user.
- Elements:
  - ID: reservations-page - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.
  - ID: reservations-table - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.
  - ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id} - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- Page Title: My Reviews
- Overview: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- Elements:
  - ID: reviews-page - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - ID: reviews-list - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.
  - ID: edit-review-button-{review_id} - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).
  - ID: delete-review-button-{review_id} - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- Page Title: Write Review
- Overview: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book.
- Elements:
  - ID: write-review-page - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - ID: book-info-display - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.
  - ID: rating-input - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - ID: review-text - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - ID: submit-review-button - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - ID: back-to-book - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.

### 9. User Profile Page
- Page Title: My Profile
- Overview: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- Elements:
  - ID: profile-page - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - ID: profile-username - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - ID: profile-email - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - ID: update-profile-button - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - ID: borrow-history - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 10. Payment Confirmation Page
- Page Title: Payment Confirmation
- Overview: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines.
- Elements:
  - ID: payment-page - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.
  - ID: fine-amount-display - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.
  - ID: confirm-payment-button - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.
  - ID: back-to-profile - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.


## Section 2: Data Storage Design

Data files are located in the `data` directory.

### 1. User Data
- File Name: `users.txt`
- Format: username|email|phone|address
- Example:
  john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St
  jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St

### 2. Books Data
- File Name: `books.txt`
- Format: book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating
- Example:
  1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6
  3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7
  4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5
  5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3

### 3. Borrowings Data
- File Name: `borrowings.txt`
- Format: borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount
- Example:
  1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0
  2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0
  3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00

### 4. Reservations Data
- File Name: `reservations.txt`
- Format: reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status
- Example:
  1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active
  2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled

### 5. Reviews Data
- File Name: `reviews.txt`
- Format: review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date
- Example:
  1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03
  2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20

### 6. Fines Data
- File Name: `fines.txt`
- Format: fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued
- Example:
  1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30


## Section 3: Navigation and Inter-page Relationships

- Dashboard Page:
  - "Browse Books" button navigates to Book Catalog Page.
  - "My Borrows" button navigates to My Borrowings Page.
  - "My Reservations", "My Reviews", "My Profile" can be accessed from dashboard menu or navigation bar (not explicitly defined but assumed for usability).

- Book Catalog Page:
  -"View Book" button (per book) navigates to Book Details Page for that book.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- Book Details Page:
  - "Borrow" button navigates to Borrow Confirmation Page for the selected book.
  - "Write Review" button navigates to Write Review Page.
  - "Back to Catalog" button returns to Book Catalog Page.

- Borrow Confirmation Page:
  - "Confirm Borrow" button completes borrow process and navigates to My Borrowings Page.
  - "Cancel" button returns to Book Details Page.

- My Borrowings Page:
  - "Return Book" button (per active borrow) updates borrow status and returns user to My Borrowings Page.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- My Reservations Page:
  - "Cancel Reservation" button (per reservation) cancels reservation and refreshes My Reservations Page.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- My Reviews Page:
  - "Edit Review" button navigates to Write Review Page for editing.
  - "Delete Review" button deletes the review and refreshes My Reviews Page.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- Write Review Page:
  - "Submit Review" button saves the review and returns to Book Details Page.
  - "Back to Book" button returns to Book Details Page.

- User Profile Page:
  - "Update Profile" button saves profile changes.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.
  - "Borrow History" is a display only element showing past borrowings.

- Payment Confirmation Page:
  - "Confirm Payment" button processes payment and returns to User Profile Page.
  - "Back to Profile" button returns to User Profile Page.


# End of Design Specification

=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'OnlineLibrary' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'OnlineLibrary' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to search and browse books, borrow and return books, write reviews, manage reservations, and track their borrowing history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'OnlineLibrary' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'OnlineLibrary' web application will consist of the following ten pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Library Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - **ID: browse-books-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: my-borrows-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.
  - **ID: book-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-status** - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).
  - **ID: borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.
  - **ID: reviews-section** - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to write a review.
  - **ID: back-to-catalog** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.

### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Borrow Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm book borrowing details.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: borrow-page** - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.
  - **ID: borrow-book-info** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.
  - **ID: due-date-display** - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).
  - **ID: confirm-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.
  - **ID: cancel-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.

### 5. My Borrowings Page
- **Page Title**: My Borrowings
- **Overview**: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: my-borrows-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.
  - **ID: filter-status** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).
  - **ID: borrows-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.
  - **ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id}** - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. My Reservations Page
- **Page Title**: My Reservations
- **Overview**: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.
  - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.
  - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: My Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.
  - **ID: edit-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).
  - **ID: delete-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: book-info-display** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.
  - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - **ID: back-to-book** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - **ID: borrow-history** - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 10. Payment Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Payment Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: payment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.
  - **ID: fine-amount-display** - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.
  - **ID: confirm-payment-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.
  - **ID: back-to-profile** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'OnlineLibrary' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  username|email|phone|address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St
  jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St
  ```

### 2. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6
  3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7
  4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5
  5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3
  ```

### 3. Borrowings Data
- **File Name**: `borrowings.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0
  2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0
  3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00
  ```

### 4. Reservations Data
- **File Name**: `reservations.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active
  2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled
  ```

### 5. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03
  2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20
  ```

### 6. Fines Data
- **File Name**: `fines.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30
  ```

All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.


=== design_spec.md ===
# OnlineLibrary Web Application Design Specification

## Section 1: Web Pages and Elements

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Page Title: Library Dashboard
- Overview: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities.
- Elements:
  - ID: dashboard-page - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - ID: welcome-message - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - ID: browse-books-button - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - ID: my-borrows-button - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- Page Title: Book Catalog
- Overview: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options.
- Elements:
  - ID: catalog-page - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.
  - ID: search-input - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.
  - ID: book-grid - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.
  - ID: view-book-button-{book_id} - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Book Details Page
- Page Title: Book Details
- Overview: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- Elements:
  - ID: book-details-page - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - ID: book-title - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - ID: book-author - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - ID: book-status - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).
  - ID: borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.
  - ID: reviews-section - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.
  - ID: write-review-button - Type: Button - Button to write a review.
  - ID: back-to-catalog - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.

### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page
- Page Title: Borrow Confirmation
- Overview: A page to confirm book borrowing details.
- Elements:
  - ID: borrow-page - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.
  - ID: borrow-book-info - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.
  - ID: due-date-display - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).
  - ID: confirm-borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.
  - ID: cancel-borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.

### 5. My Borrowings Page
- Page Title: My Borrowings
- Overview: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user.
- Elements:
  - ID: my-borrows-page - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.
  - ID: filter-status - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).
  - ID: borrows-table - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.
  - ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id} - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. My Reservations Page
- Page Title: My Reservations
- Overview: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user.
- Elements:
  - ID: reservations-page - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.
  - ID: reservations-table - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.
  - ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id} - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- Page Title: My Reviews
- Overview: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- Elements:
  - ID: reviews-page - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - ID: reviews-list - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.
  - ID: edit-review-button-{review_id} - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).
  - ID: delete-review-button-{review_id} - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- Page Title: Write Review
- Overview: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book.
- Elements:
  - ID: write-review-page - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - ID: book-info-display - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.
  - ID: rating-input - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - ID: review-text - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - ID: submit-review-button - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - ID: back-to-book - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.

### 9. User Profile Page
- Page Title: My Profile
- Overview: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- Elements:
  - ID: profile-page - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - ID: profile-username - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - ID: profile-email - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - ID: update-profile-button - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - ID: borrow-history - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 10. Payment Confirmation Page
- Page Title: Payment Confirmation
- Overview: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines.
- Elements:
  - ID: payment-page - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.
  - ID: fine-amount-display - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.
  - ID: confirm-payment-button - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.
  - ID: back-to-profile - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.


## Section 2: Data Storage Design

Data files are located in the `data` directory.

### 1. User Data
- File Name: `users.txt`
- Format: username|email|phone|address
- Example:
  john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St
  jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St

### 2. Books Data
- File Name: `books.txt`
- Format: book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating
- Example:
  1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6
  3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7
  4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5
  5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3

### 3. Borrowings Data
- File Name: `borrowings.txt`
- Format: borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount
- Example:
  1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0
  2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0
  3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00

### 4. Reservations Data
- File Name: `reservations.txt`
- Format: reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status
- Example:
  1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active
  2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled

### 5. Reviews Data
- File Name: `reviews.txt`
- Format: review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date
- Example:
  1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03
  2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20

### 6. Fines Data
- File Name: `fines.txt`
- Format: fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued
- Example:
  1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30


## Section 3: Navigation and Inter-page Relationships

- Dashboard Page:
  - "Browse Books" button navigates to Book Catalog Page.
  - "My Borrows" button navigates to My Borrowings Page.
  - "My Reservations", "My Reviews", "My Profile" can be accessed from dashboard menu or navigation bar (not explicitly defined but assumed for usability).

- Book Catalog Page:
  -"View Book" button (per book) navigates to Book Details Page for that book.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- Book Details Page:
  - "Borrow" button navigates to Borrow Confirmation Page for the selected book.
  - "Write Review" button navigates to Write Review Page.
  - "Back to Catalog" button returns to Book Catalog Page.

- Borrow Confirmation Page:
  - "Confirm Borrow" button completes borrow process and navigates to My Borrowings Page.
  - "Cancel" button returns to Book Details Page.

- My Borrowings Page:
  - "Return Book" button (per active borrow) updates borrow status and returns user to My Borrowings Page.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- My Reservations Page:
  - "Cancel Reservation" button (per reservation) cancels reservation and refreshes My Reservations Page.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- My Reviews Page:
  - "Edit Review" button navigates to Write Review Page for editing.
  - "Delete Review" button deletes the review and refreshes My Reviews Page.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- Write Review Page:
  - "Submit Review" button saves the review and returns to Book Details Page.
  - "Back to Book" button returns to Book Details Page.

- User Profile Page:
  - "Update Profile" button saves profile changes.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.
  - "Borrow History" is a display only element showing past borrowings.

- Payment Confirmation Page:
  - "Confirm Payment" button processes payment and returns to User Profile Page.
  - "Back to Profile" button returns to User Profile Page.

  - ID: profile-username - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - ID: profile-email - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - ID: update-profile-button - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - ID: borrow-history - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 10. Payment Confirmation Page
- Page Title: Payment Confirmation
- Overview: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines.
- Elements:
  - ID: payment-page - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.
  - ID: fine-amount-display - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.
  - ID: confirm-payment-button - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.
  - ID: back-to-profile - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.


## Section 2: Data Storage Design

Data files are located in the `data` directory.

### 1. User Data
- File Name: `users.txt`
- Format: username|email|phone|address
- Example:
  john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St
  jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St

### 2. Books Data
- File Name: `books.txt`
- Format: book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating
- Example:
  1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6
  3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7
  4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5
  5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3

### 3. Borrowings Data
- File Name: `borrowings.txt`
- Format: borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount
- Example:
  1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0
  2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0
  3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00

### 4. Reservations Data
- File Name: `reservations.txt`
- Format: reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status
- Example:
  1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active
  2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled

### 5. Reviews Data
- File Name: `reviews.txt`
- Format: review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date
- Example:
  1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03
  2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20

### 6. Fines Data
- File Name: `fines.txt`
- Format: fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued
- Example:
  1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30


## Section 3: Navigation and Inter-page Relationships

- Dashboard Page:
  - "Browse Books" button navigates to Book Catalog Page.
  - "My Borrows" button navigates to My Borrowings Page.
  - "My Reservations", "My Reviews", "My Profile" can be accessed from dashboard menu or navigation bar (not explicitly defined but assumed for usability).

- Book Catalog Page:
  -"View Book" button (per book) navigates to Book Details Page for that book.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- Book Details Page:
  - "Borrow" button navigates to Borrow Confirmation Page for the selected book.
  - "Write Review" button navigates to Write Review Page.
  - "Back to Catalog" button returns to Book Catalog Page.

- Borrow Confirmation Page:
  - "Confirm Borrow" button completes borrow process and navigates to My Borrowings Page.
  - "Cancel" button returns to Book Details Page.

- My Borrowings Page:
  - "Return Book" button (per active borrow) updates borrow status and returns user to My Borrowings Page.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- My Reservations Page:
  - "Cancel Reservation" button (per reservation) cancels reservation and refreshes My Reservations Page.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- My Reviews Page:
  - "Edit Review" button navigates to Write Review Page for editing.
  - "Delete Review" button deletes the review and refreshes My Reviews Page.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.

- Write Review Page:
  - "Submit Review" button saves the review and returns to Book Details Page.
  - "Back to Book" button returns to Book Details Page.

- User Profile Page:
  - "Update Profile" button saves profile changes.
  - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.
  - "Borrow History" is a display only element showing past borrowings.

- Payment Confirmation Page:
  - "Confirm Payment" button processes payment and returns to User Profile Page.
  - "Back to Profile" button returns to User Profile Page.


# End of Design Specification

=== user_task_description ===

# Requirements Document for 'OnlineLibrary' Web Application

## 1. Objective
Develop a comprehensive web application named 'OnlineLibrary' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to search and browse books, borrow and return books, write reviews, manage reservations, and track their borrowing history. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.

## 2. Language
The required development language for the 'OnlineLibrary' application is Python.

## 3. Page Design

The 'OnlineLibrary' web application will consist of the following ten pages:

### 1. Dashboard Page
- **Page Title**: Library Dashboard
- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - **ID: welcome-message** - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - **ID: browse-books-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - **ID: my-borrows-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- **Page Title**: Book Catalog
- **Overview**: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: catalog-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.
  - **ID: search-input** - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.
  - **ID: book-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.
  - **ID: view-book-button-{book_id}** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Book Details Page
- **Page Title**: Book Details
- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: book-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - **ID: book-title** - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - **ID: book-author** - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - **ID: book-status** - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).
  - **ID: borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.
  - **ID: reviews-section** - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.
  - **ID: write-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to write a review.
  - **ID: back-to-catalog** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.

### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Borrow Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm book borrowing details.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: borrow-page** - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.
  - **ID: borrow-book-info** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.
  - **ID: due-date-display** - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).
  - **ID: confirm-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.
  - **ID: cancel-borrow-button** - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.

### 5. My Borrowings Page
- **Page Title**: My Borrowings
- **Overview**: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: my-borrows-page** - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.
  - **ID: filter-status** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).
  - **ID: borrows-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.
  - **ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id}** - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. My Reservations Page
- **Page Title**: My Reservations
- **Overview**: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reservations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.
  - **ID: reservations-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.
  - **ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}** - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- **Page Title**: My Reviews
- **Overview**: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: reviews-page** - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - **ID: reviews-list** - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.
  - **ID: edit-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).
  - **ID: delete-review-button-{review_id}** - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- **Page Title**: Write Review
- **Overview**: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: write-review-page** - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - **ID: book-info-display** - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.
  - **ID: rating-input** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - **ID: review-text** - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - **ID: submit-review-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - **ID: back-to-book** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.

### 9. User Profile Page
- **Page Title**: My Profile
- **Overview**: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: profile-page** - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - **ID: profile-username** - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - **ID: profile-email** - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - **ID: update-profile-button** - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - **ID: borrow-history** - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.
  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 10. Payment Confirmation Page
- **Page Title**: Payment Confirmation
- **Overview**: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines.
- **Elements**:
  - **ID: payment-page** - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.
  - **ID: fine-amount-display** - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.
  - **ID: confirm-payment-button** - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.
  - **ID: back-to-profile** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.

## 4. Data Storage

The 'OnlineLibrary' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory 'data'. The following data formats and examples are defined:

### 1. User Data
- **File Name**: `users.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  username|email|phone|address
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St
  jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St
  ```

### 2. Books Data
- **File Name**: `books.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8
  2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6
  3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7
  4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5
  5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3
  ```

### 3. Borrowings Data
- **File Name**: `borrowings.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0
  2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0
  3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00
  ```

### 4. Reservations Data
- **File Name**: `reservations.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active
  2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled
  ```

### 5. Reviews Data
- **File Name**: `reviews.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03
  2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20
  ```

### 6. Fines Data
- **File Name**: `fines.txt`
- **Data Format**:
  ```
  fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued
  ```
- **Example Data**:
  ```
  1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30
  ```

All files will be saved in the `data` directory to ensure organization and easy access. The format uses a pipe (`|`) delimiter for better readability and parsing.


=== design_spec.md ===
# OnlineLibrary Web Application Design Specification

## Section 1: Web Pages and Elements

### 1. Dashboard Page
- Page Title: Library Dashboard
- Overview: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities.
- Elements:
  - ID: dashboard-page - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.
  - ID: welcome-message - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.
  - ID: browse-books-button - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.
  - ID: my-borrows-button - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.

### 2. Book Catalog Page
- Page Title: Book Catalog
- Overview: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options.
- Elements:
  - ID: catalog-page - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.
  - ID: search-input - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.
  - ID: book-grid - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.
  - ID: view-book-button-{book_id} - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 3. Book Details Page
- Page Title: Book Details
- Overview: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book.
- Elements:
  - ID: book-details-page - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.
  - ID: book-title - Type: H1 - Display book title.
  - ID: book-author - Type: Div - Display book author.
  - ID: book-status - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).
  - ID: borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.
  - ID: reviews-section - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.
  - ID: write-review-button - Type: Button - Button to write a review.
  - ID: back-to-catalog - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.

### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page
- Page Title: Borrow Confirmation
- Overview: A page to confirm book borrowing details.
- Elements:
  - ID: borrow-page - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.
  - ID: borrow-book-info - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.
  - ID: due-date-display - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).
  - ID: confirm-borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.
  - ID: cancel-borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.

### 5. My Borrowings Page
- Page Title: My Borrowings
- Overview: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user.
- Elements:
  - ID: my-borrows-page - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.
  - ID: filter-status - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).
  - ID: borrows-table - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.
  - ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id} - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 6. My Reservations Page
- Page Title: My Reservations
- Overview: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user.
- Elements:
  - ID: reservations-page - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.
  - ID: reservations-table - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.
  - ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id} - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 7. My Reviews Page
- Page Title: My Reviews
- Overview: A page displaying all reviews written by the user.
- Elements:
  - ID: reviews-page - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.
  - ID: reviews-list - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.
  - ID: edit-review-button-{review_id} - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).
  - ID: delete-review-button-{review_id} - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 8. Write Review Page
- Page Title: Write Review
- Overview: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book.
- Elements:
  - ID: write-review-page - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.
  - ID: book-info-display - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.
  - ID: rating-input - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).
  - ID: review-text - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.
  - ID: submit-review-button - Type: Button - Button to submit review.
  - ID: back-to-book - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.

### 9. User Profile Page
- Page Title: My Profile
- Overview: A page for users to view and edit their profile information.
- Elements:
  - ID: profile-page - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.
  - ID: profile-username - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).
  - ID: profile-email - Type: Input - Field to update email.
  - ID: update-profile-button - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.
  - ID: borrow-history - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.
  - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.

### 10. Payment Confirmation Page

- Overview: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines.
- Elements:

  - ID: confirm-payment-button - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.

  [design_spec.md] # OnlineLibrary Web Application Design Specification  ## Section 1: Web Pages and Elements  ### 1. Dashboard Page - Page Title: Library Dashboard - Overview: The main hub displaying featured books and navigation to other functionalities. - Elements:   - ID: dashboard-page - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.   - ID: welcome-message - Type: H1 - Welcome message displaying username.   - ID: browse-books-button - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book catalog page.   - ID: my-borrows-button - Type: Button - Button to navigate to my borrowings page.  ### 2. Book Catalog Page - Page Title: Book Catalog - Overview: A page displaying all available books with filtering and search options. - Elements:   - ID: catalog-page - Type: Div - Container for the book catalog page.   - ID: search-input - Type: Input - Field to search books by title or author.   - ID: book-grid - Type: Div - Grid displaying book cards with cover, title, author, and status.   - ID: view-book-button-{book_id} - Type: Button - Button to navigate to book details page (each book card has this).   - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 3. Book Details Page - Page Title: Book Details - Overview: A page displaying detailed information about a specific book. - Elements:   - ID: book-details-page - Type: Div - Container for the book details page.   - ID: book-title - Type: H1 - Display book title.   - ID: book-author - Type: Div - Display book author.   - ID: book-status - Type: Div - Display availability status (Available, Borrowed, Reserved).   - ID: borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to borrow the book.   - ID: reviews-section - Type: Div - Section displaying user reviews.   - ID: write-review-button - Type: Button - Button to write a review.   - ID: back-to-catalog - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to catalog.  ### 4. Borrow Confirmation Page - Page Title: Borrow Confirmation - Overview: A page to confirm book borrowing details. - Elements:   - ID: borrow-page - Type: Div - Container for the borrow confirmation page.   - ID: borrow-book-info - Type: Div - Display information about the book being borrowed.   - ID: due-date-display - Type: Div - Display the due date for return (14 days from borrow).   - ID: confirm-borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to confirm borrowing.   - ID: cancel-borrow-button - Type: Button - Button to cancel and go back.  ### 5. My Borrowings Page - Page Title: My Borrowings - Overview: A page displaying all books currently borrowed by the user. - Elements:   - ID: my-borrows-page - Type: Div - Container for the my borrowings page.   - ID: filter-status - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Active, Returned, Overdue).   - ID: borrows-table - Type: Table - Table displaying borrowed books with title, borrow date, due date, status.   - ID: return-book-button-{borrow_id} - Type: Button - Button to return book (each active borrow has this).   - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 6. My Reservations Page - Page Title: My Reservations - Overview: A page displaying all book reservations made by the user. - Elements:   - ID: reservations-page - Type: Div - Container for the reservations page.   - ID: reservations-table - Type: Table - Table displaying reserved books with title, reservation date, status.   - ID: cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id} - Type: Button - Button to cancel reservation (each row has this).   - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 7. My Reviews Page - Page Title: My Reviews - Overview: A page displaying all reviews written by the user. - Elements:   - ID: reviews-page - Type: Div - Container for the reviews page.   - ID: reviews-list - Type: Div - List of reviews with book title, rating, review text.   - ID: edit-review-button-{review_id} - Type: Button - Button to edit review (each review has this).   - ID: delete-review-button-{review_id} - Type: Button - Button to delete review (each review has this).   - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 8. Write Review Page - Page Title: Write Review - Overview: A page for users to write or edit a review for a book. - Elements:   - ID: write-review-page - Type: Div - Container for the write review page.   - ID: book-info-display - Type: Div - Display information about the book being reviewed.   - ID: rating-input - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select rating (1-5 stars).   - ID: review-text - Type: Textarea - Field to write review text.   - ID: submit-review-button - Type: Button - Button to submit review.   - ID: back-to-book - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to book details.  ### 9. User Profile Page - Page Title: My Profile - Overview: A page for users to view and edit their profile information. - Elements:   - ID: profile-page - Type: Div - Container for the profile page.   - ID: profile-username - Type: Div - Display username (not editable).   - ID: profile-email - Type: Input - Field to update email.   - ID: update-profile-button - Type: Button - Button to save profile changes.   - ID: borrow-history - Type: Div - Display list of all previously borrowed books.   - ID: back-to-dashboard - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.  ### 10. Payment Confirmation Page - Page Title: Payment Confirmation - Overview: A page to confirm payment of overdue fines. - Elements:   - ID: payment-page - Type: Div - Container for the payment confirmation page.   - ID: fine-amount-display - Type: Div - Display the fine amount to be paid.   - ID: confirm-payment-button - Type: Button - Button to confirm payment.   - ID: back-to-profile - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to profile.   ## Section 2: Data Storage Design  Data files are located in the `data` directory.  ### 1. User Data - File Name: `users.txt` - Format: username|email|phone|address - Example:   john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St   jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St  ### 2. Books Data - File Name: `books.txt` - Format: book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating - Example:   1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8   2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6   3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7   4|The Selfish Gene|Richard Dawkins|978-0-19-286092-7|Science|Oxford University Press|1976|Gene-centered view of evolution.|Reserved|4.5   5|Steve Jobs|Walter Isaacson|978-1-4516-4853-9|Biography|Simon & Schuster|2011|Biography of Apple co-founder.|Available|4.3  ### 3. Borrowings Data - File Name: `borrowings.txt` - Format: borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount - Example:   1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0   2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0   3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00  ### 4. Reservations Data - File Name: `reservations.txt` - Format: reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status - Example:   1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active   2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled  ### 5. Reviews Data - File Name: `reviews.txt` - Format: review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date - Example:   1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03   2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20  ### 6. Fines Data - File Name: `fines.txt` - Format: fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued - Example:   1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30   ## Section 3: Navigation and Inter-page Relationships  - Dashboard Page:   - "Browse Books" button navigates to Book Catalog Page.   - "My Borrows" button navigates to My Borrowings Page.   - "My Reservations", "My Reviews", "My Profile" can be accessed from dashboard menu or navigation bar (not explicitly defined but assumed for usability).  - Book Catalog Page:   -"View Book" button (per book) navigates to Book Details Page for that book.   - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.  - Book Details Page:   - "Borrow" button navigates to Borrow Confirmation Page for the selected book.   - "Write Review" button navigates to Write Review Page.   - "Back to Catalog" button returns to Book Catalog Page.  - Borrow Confirmation Page:   - "Confirm Borrow" button completes borrow process and navigates to My Borrowings Page.   - "Cancel" button returns to Book Details Page.  - My Borrowings Page:   - "Return Book" button (per active borrow) updates borrow status and returns user to My Borrowings Page.   - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.  - My Reservations Page:   - "Cancel Reservation" button (per reservation) cancels reservation and refreshes My Reservations Page.   - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.  - My Reviews Page:   - "Edit Review" button navigates to Write Review Page for editing.   - "Delete Review" button deletes the review and refreshes My Reviews Page.   - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.  - Write Review Page:   - "Submit Review" button saves the review and returns to Book Details Page.   - "Back to Book" button returns to Book Details Page.  - User Profile Page:   - "Update Profile" button saves profile changes.   - "Back to Dashboard" button returns to Dashboard Page.   - "Borrow History" is a display only element showing past borrowings.  - Payment Confirmation Page:   - "Confirm Payment" button processes payment and returns to User Profile Page.   - "Back to Profile" button returns to User Profile Page.   # End of Design Specification

datetime, timedelta\n\napp = Flask(__name__)\napp.secret_key = 'supersecretkey'\nDATA_DIR = 'data'\n\n# Helper functions to read and write data\n\ndef read_lines(filename):\n    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, filename)\n    if not os.path.exists(path):\n        return []\n    with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        return [line.strip() for line in f.readlines() if line.strip()]\n\n\ndef write_lines(filename, lines):\n    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, filename)\n    with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        f.write('\\n'.join(lines) + '\\n')\n\n# Load users as dict by username\n\ndef load_users():\n    lines = read_lines('users.txt')\n    users = {}\n    for line in lines:\n        parts = line.split('|')\n        if len(parts) >= 4:\n            username, email, phone, address = parts\n            users[username] = {\n                'username': username,\n                'email': email,\n                'phone': phone,\n                'address': address\n            }\n    return users\n\n# Save users\n\ndef save_users(users):\n    lines = []\n    for u in users.values():\n        line = '|'.join([u['username'], u['email'], u['phone'], u['address']])\n        lines.append(line)\n    write_lines('users.txt', lines)\n\n# Load books as dict by book_id\n\ndef load_books():\n    lines = read_lines('books.txt')\n    books = {}\n    for line in lines:\n        parts = line.split('|')\n        if len(parts) >= 10:\n            book_id = parts[0]\n            books[book_id] = {\n                'book_id': book_id,\n                'title': parts[1],\n                'author': parts[2],\n                'isbn': parts[3],\n                'genre': parts[4],\n                'publisher': parts[5],\n                'year': parts[6],\n                'description': parts[7],\n                'status': parts[8],\n                'avg_rating': float(parts[9]) if parts[9] else 0\n            }\n    return books\n\n# Save books\n\ndef save_books(books):\n    lines = []\n    for b in books.values():\n        line = '|'.join([\n            b['book_id'], b['title'], b['author'], b['isbn'], b['genre'],\n            b['publisher'], b['year'], b['description'], b['status'],\n            '{:.1f}'.format(b['avg_rating'])\n        ])\n        lines.append(line)\n    write_lines('books.txt', lines)\n\n# Load borrowings as dict by borrow_id\n\ndef load_borrowings():\n    lines = read_lines('borrowings.txt')\n    borrowings = {}\n    for line in lines:\n        parts = line.split('|')\n        if len(parts) >= 8:\n            borrow_id = parts[0]\n            borrowings[borrow_id] = {\n                'borrow_id': borrow_id,\n                'username': parts[1],\n                'book_id': parts[2],\n                'borrow_date': parts[3],\n                'due_date': parts[4],\n                'return_date': parts[5] if parts[5] else None,\n                'status': parts[6],\n                'fine_amount': float(parts[7])\n            }\n    return borrowings\n\n# Save borrowings\n\ndef save_borrowings(borrowings):\n    lines = []\n    for b in borrowings.values():\n        line = '|'.join([\n            b['borrow_id'], b['username'], b['book_id'], b['borrow_date'],\n            b['due_date'], b['return_date'] if b['return_date'] else '', b['status'],\n            '{:.2f}'.format(b['fine_amount'])\n        ])\n        lines.append(line)\n    write_lines('borrowings.txt', lines)\n\n# Load reservations as dict by reservation_id\n\ndef load_reservations():\n    lines = read_lines('reservations.txt')\n    reservations = {}\n    for line in lines:\n        parts = line.split('|')\n        if len(parts) >= 5:\n            reservation_id = parts[0]\n            reservations[reservation_id] = {\n                'reservation_id': reservation_id,\n                'username': parts[1],\n                'book_id': parts[2],\n                'reservation_date': parts[3],\n                'status': parts[4]\n            }\n    return reservations\n\n# Save reservations\n\ndef save_reservations(reservations):\n    lines = []\n    for r in reservations.values():\n        line = '|'.join([\n            r['reservation_id'], r['username'], r['book_id'], r['reservation_date'], r['status']\n        ])\n        lines.append(line)\n    write_lines('reservations.txt', lines)\n\n# Load reviews as dict by review_id\n\ndef load_reviews():\n    lines = read_lines('reviews.txt')\n    reviews = {}\n    for line in lines:\n        parts = line.split('|')\n        if len(parts) >= 6:\n            review_id = parts[0]\n            reviews[review_id] = {\n                'review_id': review_id,\n                'username': parts[1],\n                'book_id': parts[2],\n                'rating': int(parts[3]),\n                'review_text': parts[4],\n                'review_date': parts[5]\n            }\n    return reviews\n\n# Save reviews\n\ndef save_reviews(reviews):\n    lines = []\n    for r in reviews.values():\n        line = '|'.join([\n            r['review_id'], r['username'], r['book_id'], str(r['rating']), r['review_text'], r['review_date']\n        ])\n        lines.append(line)\n    write_lines('reviews.txt', lines)\n\n# Load fines as dict by fine_id\n\ndef load_fines():\n    lines = read_lines('fines.txt')\n    fines = {}\n    for line in lines:\n        parts = line.split('|')\n        if len(parts) >= 6:\n            fine_id = parts[0]\n            fines[fine_id] = {\n                'fine_id': fine_id,\n                'username': parts[1],\n                'borrow_id': parts[2],\n                'amount': float(parts[3]),\n                'status': parts[4],\n                'date_issued': parts[5]\n            }\n    return fines\n\n# Save fines\n\ndef save_fines(fines):\n    lines = []\n    for f in fines.values():\n        line = '|'.join([\n            f['fine_id'], f['username'], f['borrow_id'], '{:.2f}'.format(f['amount']), f['status'], f['date_issued']\n        ])\n        lines.append(line)\n    write_lines('fines.txt', lines)\n\n# Util: Get logged in username\n\ndef get_username():\n    return session.get('username', None)\n\n# Util: Require login\n\ndef require_login():\n    if get_username() is None:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n\n# Route: Simulated login (just enter username)\n@app.route('/login', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef login():\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        username = request.form.get('username')\n        users = load_users()\n        if username in users:\n            session['username'] = username\n            return redirect(url_for('dashboard'))\n        else:\n            flash('Username not found')\n    return render_template('login.html')\n\n# Route: Logout\n@app.route('/logout')\ndef logout():\n    session.pop('username', None)\n    return redirect(url_for('login'))\n\n# 1. Dashboard Page\n@app.route('/')\n@app.route('/dashboard')\ndef dashboard():\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    books = load_books()\n    # Show some featured books (first 5)\n    featured_books = list(books.values())[:5]\n    return render_template('dashboard.html', username=username, featured_books=featured_books)\n\n# 2. Book Catalog Page\n@app.route('/catalog', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef catalog():\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    books = load_books()\n    search_term = ''\n    filtered_books = list(books.values())\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        search_term = request.form.get('search-input', '').strip().lower()\n        if search_term:\n            filtered_books = [b for b in filtered_books if search_term in b['title'].lower() or search_term in b['author'].lower()]\n    return render_template('catalog.html', books=filtered_books, search_term=search_term)\n\n# 3. Book Details Page\n@app.route('/book/<book_id>')\ndef book_details(book_id):\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    books = load_books()\n    book = books.get(book_id)\n    if not book:\n        return 'Book not found', 404\n    reviews = load_reviews()\n    book_reviews = [r for r in reviews.values() if r['book_id'] == book_id]\n    return render_template('book_details.html', book=book, reviews=book_reviews)\n\n# 4. Borrow Confirmation Page\n@app.route('/borrow/<book_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef borrow_confirm(book_id):\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    books = load_books()\n    book = books.get(book_id)\n    if not book:\n        return 'Book not found', 404\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        # Confirm borrow\n        borrowings = load_borrowings()\n        new_id = str(max([int(k) for k in borrowings.keys()] + [0]) + 1)\n        borrow_date = datetime.now().date()\n        due_date = borrow_date + timedelta(days=14)\n        borrowings[new_id] = {\n            'borrow_id': new_id,\n            'username': username,\n            'book_id': book_id,\n            'borrow_date': borrow_date.isoformat(),\n            'due_date': due_date.isoformat(),\n            'return_date': None,\n            'status': 'Active',\n            'fine_amount': 0.0\n        }\n        # Update book status\n        book['status'] = 'Borrowed'\n        save_borrowings(borrowings)\n        books[book_id] = book\n        save_books(books)\n        return redirect(url_for('my_borrowings'))\n    due_date_display = (datetime.now() + timedelta(days=14)).date()\n    return render_template('borrow_confirmation.html', book=book, due_date=due_date_display)\n\n# 5. My Borrowings Page\n@app.route('/my-borrows', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef my_borrows():\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    borrowings = load_borrowings()\n    books = load_books()\n    user_borrows = [b for b in borrowings.values() if b['username'] == username]\n\n    filter_status = 'All'\n    filtered_borrows = user_borrows\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        filter_status = request.form.get('filter-status', 'All')\n        if filter_status != 'All':\n            filtered_borrows = [b for b in user_borrows if b['status'] == filter_status]\n\n    # Enrich with book title\n    for b in filtered_borrows:\n        b['title'] = books.get(b['book_id'], {}).get('title', 'Unknown')\n    return render_template('my_borrows.html', borrows=filtered_borrows, filter_status=filter_status)\n\n# Return book\n@app.route('/return/<borrow_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef return_book(borrow_id):\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    borrowings = load_borrowings()\n    books = load_books()\n    borrowing = borrowings.get(borrow_id)\n    if borrowing and borrowing['username'] == username and borrowing['status'] == 'Active':\n        borrowing['status'] = 'Returned'\n        borrowing['return_date'] = datetime.now().date().isoformat()\n        borrowings[borrow_id] = borrowing\n\n        # Update book status if no other active borrows\n        active_borrows_for_book = [b for b in borrowings.values() if b['book_id'] == borrowing['book_id'] and b['status'] == 'Active']\n        if not active_borrows_for_book:\n            book = books.get(borrowing['book_id'])\n            if book:\n                book['status'] = 'Available'\n                books[book['book_id']] = book\n                save_books(books)\n\n        save_borrowings(borrowings)\n    return redirect(url_for('my_borrows'))\n\n# 6. My Reservations Page\n@app.route('/my-reservations', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef my_reservations():\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    reservations = load_reservations()\n    books = load_books()\n    user_reservations = [r for r in reservations.values() if r['username'] == username]\n    \n    # Handle cancel reservation post\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        cancel_id = request.form.get('cancel_reservation_id')\n        if cancel_id and cancel_id in reservations:\n            reservations[cancel_id]['status'] = 'Cancelled'\n            save_reservations(reservations)\n            return redirect(url_for('my_reservations'))\n    \n    # Enrich\n    for r in user_reservations:\n        r['title'] = books.get(r['book_id'], {}).get('title', 'Unknown')\n    return render_template('my_reservations.html', reservations=user_reservations)\n\n# 7. My Reviews Page\n@app.route('/my-reviews', methods=['GET'])\ndef my_reviews():\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    reviews = load_reviews()\n    books = load_books()\n    user_reviews = [r for r in reviews.values() if r['username'] == username]\n    for r in user_reviews:\n        r['title'] = books.get(r['book_id'], {}).get('title', 'Unknown')\n    \n    return render_template('my_reviews.html', reviews=user_reviews)\n\n# Delete review\n@app.route('/delete-review/<review_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef delete_review(review_id):\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    reviews = load_reviews()\n    if review_id in reviews and reviews[review_id]['username'] == username:\n        del reviews[review_id]\n        save_reviews(reviews)\n    return redirect(url_for('my_reviews'))\n\n# 8. Write Review Page\n@app.route('/write-review/<book_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\n@app.route('/write-review/<book_id>/<review_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef write_review(book_id, review_id=None):\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    books = load_books()\n    book = books.get(book_id)\n    if not book:\n        return 'Book not found', 404\n    reviews = load_reviews()\n    if review_id and review_id in reviews and reviews[review_id]['username'] == username:\n        review = reviews[review_id]\n    else:\n        review = None\n\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        rating = int(request.form.get('rating-input', 1))\n        review_text = request.form.get('review-text', '').strip()\n        review_date = datetime.now().date().isoformat()\n\n        if review:  # Editing\n            review['rating'] = rating\n            review['review_text'] = review_text\n            review['review_date'] = review_date\n            reviews[review_id] = review\n        else:  # New\n            new_id = str(max([int(rid) for rid in reviews.keys()] + [0]) + 1)\n            reviews[new_id] = {\n                'review_id': new_id,\n                'username': username,\n                'book_id': book_id,\n                'rating': rating,\n                'review_text': review_text,\n                'review_date': review_date\n            }\n        save_reviews(reviews)\n        return redirect(url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id))\n\n    return render_template('write_review.html', book=book, review=review)\n\n# 9. User Profile Page\n@app.route('/profile', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef profile():\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    users = load_users()\n    user = users.get(username)\n\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        # update email only\n        new_email = request.form.get('profile-email', '').strip()\n        if new_email and user:\n            user['email'] = new_email\n            users[username] = user\n            save_users(users)\n            flash('Profile updated successfully')\n            return redirect(url_for('profile'))\n\n    # Borrow history\n    borrowings = load_borrowings()\n    books = load_books()\n    borrow_history = [b for b in borrowings.values() if b['username'] == username]\n    for b in borrow_history:\n        b['title'] = books.get(b['book_id'], {}).get('title', 'Unknown')\n    return render_template('profile.html', user=user, borrow_history=borrow_history)\n\n# 10. Payment Confirmation Page\n@app.route('/payment/<borrow_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef payment_confirmation(borrow_id):\n    username = get_username()\n    if not username:\n        return redirect(url_for('login'))\n    borrowings = load_borrowings()\n    fines = load_fines()\n    borrowing = borrowings.get(borrow_id)\n    if not borrowing or borrowing['username'] != username:\n        return 'Borrowing not found or access denied', 404\n\n    # Find unpaid fine for this borrow\n    fine_to_pay = None\n    for f in fines.values():\n        if f['borrow_id'] == borrow_id and f['status'] == 'Unpaid':\n            fine_to_pay = f\n            break\n\n    if not fine_to_pay:\n        flash('No unpaid fine for this borrowing')\n        return redirect(url_for('profile'))\n\n    if request.method == 'POST':\n        # Confirm payment\n        fine_to_pay['status'] = 'Paid'\n        save_fines(fines)\n        return redirect(url_for('profile'))\n\n    return render_template('payment_confirmation.html', fine=fine_to_pay)\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    app.run(debug=True)\n"})
